query:
ALTER TABLE atis_attachments 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extracted_content TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS word_count INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS page_count INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extraction_status VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extraction_error TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extracted_at TIMESTAMP;

ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extracted_content TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS word_count INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS page_count INT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extraction_status VARCHAR(20),
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extraction_error TEXT,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS extracted_at TIMESTAMP;
